flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at University of New Orleans vs the 2018–2022 baseline (4.5k vs 5.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of New Orleans fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6k → 4.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of New Orleans fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of New Orleans rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (57.9% → 66.8%).
